name: Request Agent Task
description: Send a request to an agent and get a response. This is the PRIMARY tool for all agent interactions — asking questions, submitting tasks, or requesting actions. Creates a tracked Job with a result. Set wait=true to get the response inline. Use this instead of agent_message unless you explicitly want a fire-and-forget notification.

wait.description: Wait for agent to complete the task. false/absent = return immediately (async). true = block indefinitely. Integer = timeout in milliseconds, returns current status on timeout.

output.description: Job status object for the task. Same shape as grid:invoke output.

created.description: Timestamp when the task was created

output.description: Task output, present when status is COMPLETE and wait=true
